not-found.title: Page not found
not-found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

forbidden.title: Permission denied
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to view this content. Contact an admin if you need access.

unauthorized.title: Sign in required
unauthorized.description: Your session is missing or has expired. Please sign in to continue.

server.title: Something went wrong
server.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or return to the home page.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: This page could not be displayed. Please try again later.
